'''Reef Home City''' was a floating [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]].The [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Reef Home]]'' was named after the city.<ref name="TCSWE" /> The city was webbed by [[Color/Legends|pink]] [[Coral/Legends|coral]] and housed a [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|generator]] for Dac's [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield]].<ref name="Strongholds">''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]''</ref>

==History==
Admiral [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] assaulted the city with turbolaser fire and cracked it into fragments,<ref name="TCSWE" /> but it was eventually rebuilt.

{{City-stub}}
